title: U.S. DOJ demands Apple and Google unmask over 100k users of car-tinkering app
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice is demanding Apple and Google reveal the identities of over 100,000 users of a car-tinkering app, as part of an emissions crackdown. This raises significant privacy and legal questions about user data protection, platform responsibility, and government overreach in the context of automotive software modifications.
